data.name: Hentai World Cave
data.detailed_description:
Begin a calm and enchanting puzzle journey where completing each level unveils beautiful portraits of charming girls. Gentle background music creates a relaxing atmosphere as you thoughtfully slide and arrange tiles, slowly bringing every image into focus, piece by piece.

Play at your own pace with no timers or pressure, and enjoy the rewarding sense of advancement as the puzzles gradually become more challenging. Whether you’re playing casually or you love solving puzzles, this game delivers a perfect blend of relaxation, elegance, and visually stunning artwork.

Features:

Unlock stunning and alluring girl artwork with every completed stage.

Enjoy soft, soothing background music that deepens immersion.

View finished images in full-screen for maximum visual impact.

Experience puzzles that steadily increase in complexity.

No time limits — relax, take your time, and savor the experience.

data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 保加利亞文*, 荷蘭文*, 芬蘭文*, 匈牙利文*, 印尼語*, 日文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*, 簡體中文*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲*, 瑞典文, 繁體中文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP, Vista, 7, 8, or 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 512MB
